tempssm 0.2.5

    • tempssm: State-space modeling for temperature time series in R
  • Changelog

Collect time series cross-validation results into a tibble

Source: R/ts_cross_validation.R
ts_cv_collect.Rd

Combine cross-validation results and evaluation metrics into a tidy tibble with one row per fold.

Usage

ts_cv_collect(cv_results, metrics)

Arguments

cv_results

A list of results returned by ts_cv_run().

metrics

A list of evaluation metrics returned by compute_cv_metrics(), corresponding to cv_results.

Value

A tibble where each row represents a cross-validation fold, with columns fold, converged, MAE, MASE_naive, and MASE_seasonal.

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
data(yamaguchi_sst)

# 1. create train/test splits
folds <- ts_train_test_split(
  temp_data = yamaguchi_sst,
  initial   = 60,
  horizon   = 12,
  step      = 12
)

# 2. run cross-validation over all folds
cv_results <- ts_cv_run(folds)

# 3. compute metrics for each fold
metrics <- lapply(cv_results, compute_cv_metrics)

# 4. collect results into a tidy tibble
cv_summary <- ts_cv_collect(cv_results, metrics)

cv_summary
} # }
